title: froelichia nudicaulis subsp. longispicata
intro: Froelichia nudicaulis subsp. longispicata, also known as the "stickleaf" or "desert stickleaf," is a plant species that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Froelichia nudicaulis subsp. longispicata is valued for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in reducing swelling and relieving symptoms associated with urinary tract infections and kidney stones. The plant's medicinal properties also offer potential health benefits, including alleviating fever, reducing blood pressure, and promoting digestive health. Froelichia nudicaulis subsp. longispicata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
